probes.name: branch-table-migrated
probes.description: The `branches` table exists + carries the latest schema version. Failure indicates a missed migration.

probes.name: branch-organization-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every `branches.organization_id` resolves to a live `organizations` row AND `organization.tenant_id === branch.tenant_id`. Failure catches orphaned rows OR cross-tenant drift after out-of-band SQL.
probes.reference: The FK is onDelete=restrict + the observer refuses cross-tenant creation, so the DB should never permit orphans; this probe catches direct SQL manipulation.

probes.name: branch-region-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every `branches.region_id` resolves to a live `regions` row AND `region.tenant_id === branch.tenant_id`. Same shape as the organization check.

probes.name: branch-default-invariant
probes.description: Every (tenant_id, organization_id) tuple with at least one active or paused Branch has EXACTLY ONE row with `is_default = true` (excluding closed branches). Failure is a data-quality signal; the observer + partial unique index normally prevent this state.

probes.name: branch-google-maps-reachable
probes.description: Google Maps Geocoding API reachable + returns a valid response for a known-good address probe. Non-critical because other providers exist + the module has a manual-pin fallback.

probes.name: branch-geocoding-queue-drained
probes.description: No `GeocodeAddressJob` has been pending for > 30 minutes. Catches subprocessor stalls that would delay coordinate updates for hours.

probes.name: branch-reconcile-queue-drained
probes.description: No `ReconcileDefaultBranchInvariantJob` has been pending for > 24h. Nightly job — a stall indicates the queue worker is degraded.

probes.name: branch-amenity-catalog-loaded
probes.description: The platform amenity catalogue (from `data/amenity-catalog.json`) parsed successfully at boot. Failure indicates a malformed catalogue — writes touching amenities would fail hard.
